summary: All 21 integration tests passed. Command routing verified: /create-epic → architecture skill, /ideate → requirements.md. Schema integration validated: epic schema relocated from orchestration to architecture with clean separation. Dual-path sync confirmed across src/ and .claude/ trees.

AC1_create_epic_routing.finding: ✅ create-epic.md routes to devforgeai-architecture via Skill(command=...) at line 133. Mode marker 'epic-creation' set correctly. Schema validation path references architecture.

AC2_ideate_output_format.finding: ✅ /ideate command outputs requirements.md (YAML, F4 schema) as primary output. Next step guidance recommends /create-epic. No epic documents as direct output.

AC3_schema_relocation.finding: ✅ Epic schema successfully relocated to .claude/skills/devforgeai-architecture/references/skill-output-schemas.yaml. Orchestration retains brainstorm and ideation schemas. Comments reference STORY-439 relocation.

AC4_error_handling.finding: ✅ All error messages reference devforgeai-architecture skill. No Phase 4A references found (removed from orchestration). Schema validation failures reference correct architecture skill path.

AC5_dual_path_sync.finding: ✅ src/claude/ and .claude/ paths are synchronized: create-epic.md, ideate.md, and both schema files match exactly. No mismatches detected.

integration_points.name: Command → Skill Integration
integration_points.details: /create-epic invokes devforgeai-architecture skill (line 133); /ideate recommends /create-epic as next step (line 566)

integration_points.name: Schema Path Integration
integration_points.details: create-epic.md Phase 0.5 reads architecture schema path: .claude/skills/devforgeai-architecture/references/skill-output-schemas.yaml

integration_points.name: Output Format Contract
integration_points.details: /ideate produces requirements.md (F4 schema); /create-epic accepts requirements.md per ideation output schema

integration_points.name: Error Handling Routing
integration_points.details: All error messages in create-epic.md reference devforgeai-architecture (not orchestration). No Phase 4A error patterns.

integration_points.name: Dual-Path Consistency
integration_points.details: src/ and .claude/ trees synchronized; no orphaned references between trees

observations.note: Command chain clean and complete: /ideate (outputs requirements.md) → /create-epic (routes to architecture). No dangling references to removed orchestration Phase 4A.
Epic schema successfully relocated to architecture skill. Orchestration file documents relocation with STORY-439 comment. Clean separation of concerns maintained.
All changes properly synchronized between src/ (source) and .claude/ (operational) trees. No mismatches or orphaned files detected.
All error handling sections reference correct skill (devforgeai-architecture). Schema validation errors point to correct schema file. Recovery instructions guide users to architecture skill docs.
No broken cross-references detected. All skill paths, schema paths, and command references are valid. Circular dependencies absent.

anti_gaming_checks.empty_assertions: PASS - All 21 tests have real assertions validating file content
anti_gaming_checks.placeholder_comments: PASS - No TODO/FIXME placeholders in test code
anti_gaming_checks.excessive_mocking: PASS - Tests verify actual file content; no mocks
anti_gaming_checks.test_authenticity: PASS - Tests validate implementation, not mock expectations

schema_integration.focus: Verify schema file relocation and cleanup

output_format.focus: Verify /ideate outputs requirements.md with F4 schema

error_handling.focus: Verify error messages reference correct skill

dual_path_sync.focus: Verify src/ and .claude/ paths are synchronized

dependencies: STORY-436: Add Epic Creation Phases to Architecture SKILL.md
STORY-437: Remove Phase 4A from Orchestration SKILL.md

recommendations.item: Mark AC#1-AC#5 as verified in STORY-439.story.md Definition of Done section
Transition story to QA Approved status; all integration tests passed
Add end-to-end integration test for complete /ideate → /create-epic workflow with mock user input
Update framework user guide to document new command chain: /ideate → requirements.md → /create-epic → epic.md

conclusion: STORY-439 integration tests: PASS (21/21). All acceptance criteria satisfied. Command routing verified correct. Schema integration validated. Dual-path synchronization confirmed. Story ready for QA approval.
